features.name: cornerOrAnchor
features.description: Corner and stable-anchor ownership where the topology has corners.

features.name: faceCenterRayGeneralization
features.description: For face-cell Reversi boards, use the board's legal straight and diagonal/generalized ray directions from cell centers.

features.name: vertexCellSeparation
features.description: Do not mix vertex-playable and face-cell-playable directions when ranking Reversi moves.
